audit_items.proof_trace: The sole auction-start write (`s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp`, L353) is only reachable after the guard at L346-348, which reverts if `(eligibleAssets[i].amount * freshPrice) / (10**decimals) < minAuctionSizeUsd`. Grep confirms no other code path writes `s_auctionStarts`, and `performUpkeep` is not overridden in any subcontract. The check uses a freshly fetched price (revert-on-stale), so a price drop between `checkUpkeep` and `performUpkeep` also triggers a revert.
